course_title: DATA MANAGEMENT AND ANALYSIS FOR INDUSTRIAL ENGINEERS
description: Fundamentals of data management and analysis. Formulating and solving real industrial engineering problems with appropriate data managing and modeling strategies. Fundamental industrial database management strategies, data preprocessing, visualization and modeling techniques; industrial database management and analysis techniques using leading programming software (MySQL and R).

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (I SY E 210,E C E 331,MATH/​STAT  309,STAT 311, or324) or member of Engineering Guest Students
